summarization.a: The figure shows a high-resolution spectra of Ga 3d with a peak at 20.2 eV.
summarization.b: The figure shows a high-resolution spectra of O 1s with a peak at 531.1 eV.

a.question: Which spectra is shown?
a.answer: The high-resolution spectra of Ga 3d is shown in the figure.

a.question: Which species can be observed in the Ga 3d XPS spectra?
a.answer: Only one XPS peak is observed, indicating the presence of Ga-O bonds.

b.question: Which intensity peak is more intense?
b.answer: The O 1s peak is more intense than the Ga 3d peak and is related to oxidized species.

b.question: What performance advantage can be seen when both subfigures are taken into account?
b.answer: Taking both subfigures into account, this ALD process produces Ga2O3 film deposition.
